---
name: Feature request / design discussion
about: Propose a new feature, API change, or substantial refactor
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

<!-- What is missing, inefficient, or awkward? Describe the concrete situation
     where you hit the limitation, not just the abstract shape of the feature. -->

## Proposed approach

<!-- A short sketch of how this could be solved. Bullet points are fine.
     Mention the public API shape if relevant, and where in the codebase the
     change would sit. -->

## Rationale and trade-offs

<!-- Why is this worth doing? What does it cost (complexity, binary size,
     maintenance, breaking changes)? Are there alternatives you considered
     and rejected? -->

## Willingness to contribute

- [ ] I'm willing to help implement this if we agree on the approach
- [ ] I'm proposing this for discussion; someone else can implement
- [ ] I need this but can't contribute code
